case_title: MILENS OF CALIFORNIA, INC. VS EVANS LUTHER et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 398417 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILENS OF CALIFORNIA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS LUTHER EVANS DELORES C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILENS OF CALIFORNIA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS LUTHER $527.17 PRINCIPAL, $297.20 INTEREST, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $837.37, CREDITS: $240.00; RENEWAL FEE: $ 14.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
VOID 2ND ENTRY OF $14.00 CHECK(DUPLICATE RENEWAL)C C/O ERA. TERM'L PRINTER DID NOT GENERATE RECEIPT, TRIED 2ND TIME W/ SAME RESULT.
